---
title: "Model-Structured Neural Networks for Road Condition Identification in AI-Enabled Digital Twin Architecture"
author:
  - "Mojtaba Sharifzadeh"
  - "Filippo Faccini"
  - "Giovanni Maria Francesco La Scala"
  - "Alice Plebe"
  - "Mattia Piccinini"
  - "Gastone Pietro Rosati Papini"
publication: "ICRA 2026 — Workshop on AI-Driven Automation and Robotic System Integration with Digital Twins (2026)"
type: poster
categories:
  - "Posters"
  - "Model-Structured Neural Networks"
url_source:
url_preprint:
journ: "ICRA 2026 — Workshop on AI-Driven Automation and Robotic System Integration with Digital Twins"
venue: "ICRA 2026 — Workshop on AI-Driven Automation and Robotic System Integration with Digital Twins"
year: 2026
doi: ""
poster_pdf: poster.pdf
article_pdf: paper.pdf
pub_number: 55
order: -55
image: poster.png
---

::: {.poster-preview}
![](poster.png){fig-alt="Poster: Model-Structured Neural Networks for Road Condition Identification in AI-Enabled Digital Twin Architecture" width=95%}
:::
